languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, к нам обратились {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Эксплораторы{/g}. {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Генеторы{/g} Адептус Механикус выработали теорию, что Погонщицы были созданы искусственно. Теперь их {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магосы{/g} биологис запрашивают разрешение на исследования флоры и фауны Заркова. Трое техножрецов готовы возглавить исследовательскую конгрегацию".

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан, к нам обратились {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Эксплораторы{/g}. {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Генеторы{/g} Адептус Механикус выработали теорию, что Погонщицы были созданы искусственно. Теперь их {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магосы{/g} биологис запрашивают разрешение на исследования флоры и фауны Заркова. Трое техножрецов готовы возглавить исследовательскую конгрегацию".

languages.text: "Lord Captain, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created. Now their {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magi{/g} Biologis are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, к нам обратились {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Эксплораторы{/g}. {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Генеторы{/g} Адептус Механикус выработали теорию, что Погонщицы были созданы искусственно. Теперь их {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магосы{/g} биологис запрашивают разрешение на исследования флоры и фауны Заркова. Трое техножрецов готовы возглавить исследовательскую конгрегацию".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, we have been approached by the Explorators. Adeptus Mechanicus Genetors have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created. Now their Magi Biologis are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

"Lord Captain, we have been approached by the Explorators. Adeptus Mechanicus Genetors have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created. Now their Magi Biologis are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

"Lord Captain, we have been approached by the Explorators. Adeptus Mechanicus Genetors have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created. Now their Magi Biologis are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

languages.text: 「艦長、探検隊から接触がありました。機械神殿の遺伝子学者たちは、ドローバーは人工的に作られたと理論を立てました。彼らのマギ・バイオロギストがザルコフの動植物を研究する許可を求めています。3人のテク・プリーストが研究の指導者として準備しています」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, we have been approached by the Explorators. Adeptus Mechanicus Genetors have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created. Now their Magi Biologis are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

traits.locale_text: 「艦長、探検隊から接触がありました。機械神殿の遺伝子学者たちは、ドローバーは人工的に作られたと理論を立てました。彼らのマギ・バイオロギストがザルコフの動植物を研究する許可を求めています。3人のテク・プリーストが研究の指導者として準備しています。」

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, los {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}exploradores{/g} han contactado con nosotros. Los {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetores{/g} del Adeptus Mechancus han propuesto la teoría de que los Pastores son creaciones artificiales, por lo que el {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos Biologis{/g} solicita permiso para estudiar la flora y fauna de Zarkov. Tienen tres tecnosacerdotes listos para liderar la congregación investigadora».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created. Now their {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magi{/g} Biologis are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, los {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}exploradores{/g} han contactado con nosotros. Los {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetores{/g} del Adeptus Mechancus han propuesto la teoría de que los Pastores son creaciones artificiales, por lo que el {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos Biologis{/g} solicita permiso para estudiar la flora y fauna de Zarkov. Tienen tres tecnosacerdotes listos para liderar la congregación investigadora».

languages.text: “舰长大人，{g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}开拓者{/g}在与我们接洽。机械修会的{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}提出一种理论，认为拒生花是人造产物。现在，他们的生物{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}贤者{/g}正在申请许可，打算对扎尔科夫的动植物群落展开研究。已经有三位技术神甫准备好带领研究团队了。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created. Now their {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magi{/g} Biologis are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，{g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}开拓者{/g}在与我们接洽。机械修会的{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}提出一种理论，认为拒生花是人造产物。现在，他们的生物{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}贤者{/g}正在申请许可，打算对扎尔科夫的动植物群落展开研究。已经有三位技术神甫准备好带领研究团队了。”

languages.text: "Lord Captain, die {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Exploratoren{/g} haben sich an uns gewandt. Einer Theorie der {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetoren{/g} des Adeptus Mechanicus zufolge wurden die Treiber künstlich erschaffen. Seine {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magi{/g} Biologis bitten um die Erlaubnis, die Flora und Fauna von Zarkov zu studieren. Drei Techpriester stehen bereit, um die Forschungskongregation anzuführen."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created. Now their {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magi{/g} Biologis are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, die {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Exploratoren{/g} haben sich an uns gewandt. Einer Theorie der {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetoren{/g} des Adeptus Mechanicus zufolge wurden die Treiber künstlich erschaffen. Seine {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magi{/g} Biologis bitten um die Erlaubnis, die Flora und Fauna von Zarkov zu studieren. Drei Techpriester stehen bereit, um die Forschungskongregation anzuführen."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Keşiftörler{/g} bizimle temasa geçti. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetörleri{/g}, Çobanların yapay olarak yaratıldığına dair bir teori geliştirdi. Şimdi {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Biyologisler, Zarkov'un florasını ve faunasını incelemek için izin talep ediyor. Hazırda araştırma cemaatine liderlik edebilecek üç Tekno Rahip var."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created. Now their {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magi{/g} Biologis are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan, {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Keşiftörler{/g} bizimle temasa geçti. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetörleri{/g}, Çobanların yapay olarak yaratıldığına dair bir teori geliştirdi. Şimdi {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Biyologisler, Zarkov'un florasını ve faunasını incelemek için izin talep ediyor. Hazırda araştırma cemaatine liderlik edebilecek üç Tekno Rahip var."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, nous avons été contactés par les {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}explorators{/g}. Les {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetors{/g} de l'Adeptus Mechanicus pensent que les Chasseurs pourraient être des créations artificielles. Leurs {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Biologis demandent votre permission pour venir étudier la faune et la flore de Zarkov. Trois technoprêtres se sont portés volontaires pour diriger la congrégation de chercheurs. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}. Now their {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magi{/g} Biologis are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."
